Questions

Frequently Asked

What is the SugarCare Wooden Glass? +
An Ayurvedic tumbler handcrafted from authentic Vijaysar wood (Pterocarpus marsupium). Store water overnight and the wood's natural compounds infuse into it — supporting healthy blood sugar and overall wellness.
How soon will I see results? +
Many customers feel more energetic within the first week. For measurable blood sugar support, consistent daily use for 3–4 weeks is recommended. Results vary by individual.
How do I clean it? +
Rinse with plain water only — never soap or detergent. Air dry completely between uses. With proper care, the glass lasts for years.
Why does the water change colour? +
After 8–10 hours the water turns reddish-brown — this is completely normal and shows the Vijaysar compounds are actively infusing. The richer the colour, the more effective the infusion.
Is Cash on Delivery available? +
Yes! COD is available across India with free delivery. You can also pay online via UPI, Visa, Mastercard, or RuPay.
Can this replace my diabetes medication? +
This is a traditional Ayurvedic wellness tool — it should not replace prescribed medication. Always consult your doctor. It is intended to support, not replace, medical care.
